source_name: PM&C public fuel supply - four-week import orders
notes: Hand-keyed from PM&C's current and anticipated national supplies text. The figure is reported crude, diesel, jet and petrol scheduled to arrive from overseas in the next four weeks.
source_rights: PM&C copyright and disclaimer; upstream source rights remain with stated publishers
citation: Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet, Public information on fuel supply; current and anticipated national supplies text.

fields.products: crude, diesel, jet fuel and petrol
fields.excludes: Domestic refinery supply and stock already on hand
